race.description: Geraldton Cup Marquee Tickets On Sale Soon Hcp
race.comment: YAPPER (3) is promising and went back-to-back here before stepping up to 1500m at Ascot in Stakes grade and that was a bit rich. Back to this grade suits as does the shorter trip. Should find some cover and can bounce back for an in-form stable. TRULY GALLANT (1) resumes and was a comfortable winner his only fresh outing. Is building a tidy record and no surprise if he comes back further improved. The 2kg claim brings him into it. CATERAN (4) impressed winning his Maiden comfortably over this distance. The 2kg claim is handy and he won't have to improve much to feature. SHOOT TO FAME (5) has been cruelled by wide gates in both her starts for the new stable. Has the inside gate today and is capable of using it. Can't be ruled out. HILLSIDE HORACE (8) was quickly back on track last time and consider with Faithfull sticking aboard.
